items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the advanced EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Cordless Electric Select Cut Self-Propelled Touch Drive Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries and a rapid charger down at $582.04 shipped. Normally fetching $779 at full price, this package dropped to $650 at the top of April and held there for most of the month, with things now falling further for the best price we have tracked since Black Friday, when it fell to $580. The deal here gives you a 25% markdown for $197 savings, landing it at the third-lowest tracked price, just $32 above a one-time $550 low from June and July in 2025. You can also find this same advanced model with 2x 6.0Ah batteries and a rapid charger for $779 shipped, which is the best price we’ve seen since mid-December Christmas sales.

We have already detailed this morning’s Square Enix Switch game sale at Amazon and Best Buy – you’ll find all of those deals right here and down below. But Amazon has also launched a separate digital Switch game sale starting from $30 and with up to 40% in savings. You’ll find a host of first-party titles on sale here, ranging from Hyrule Warriors Age of Calamity and Kirby’s Return to Dream Land Deluxe to Nintendo Advance Wars 1+2: Re-Boot Camp alongside some third-party titles as well. Check it out right here and down below. 

Amazon Nintendo Switch game sale

items.title: Heybike’s 5th Anniversary Sale drops Mars 3.0 folding e-bike with a FREE pannier bag to $1,199 low for first time in 2026, more
items.summary:
Heybike is currently celebrating its 5th Anniversary running through the month of May with up to $800 in e-bike savings, including free bundled gear. Alongside the continued low we’re seeing on the newest Helio F Smart Folding Classic e-bike, we’re seeing a big 2026 first with Heybike’s Mars 3.0 Folding Fat Tire e-bike with a FREE pannier bag ($79 value) at $1,199 shipped. Down from a $1,799 full price, which would cost you $1,878 in full with the bag, we’ve been seeing this newer ride discounted to $1,299 in 2026, with Black Friday having been the last time we spotted it down at its all-time lowest price. Now, that low is finally appearing in 2026 for the first time, giving you $600 off the e-bike’s tag and $679 in total savings for the best price and best bundle package we have tracked to date. You can head below to learn all about it and the other offers, or check out the full lineup of anniversary deals on the main sale page here.

items.title: It’s official: The Steam Controller is coming as early as next month, and here’s how much it’ll cost
items.summary:
Valve’s Steam Controller started making rounds on the internet again earlier today, resurfacing for the first time since it was initially showcased last year, and we now finally have official release date and pricing details. Valve has confirmed that the Steam Controller will launch on May 4 – Star Wars Day – with a $99 price tag. The company added that pricing may vary by region due to distribution costs, import duties or tariffs, and local market conditions. Head below for a closer look at the controller along with additional details.

Down from its $469 MSRP, we’ve been seeing this more compact power solution down at $296 since April began, which dropped to this same rate a few times with similar short-term Lightning sales. Currently at 30% of its stock taken at the time of writing this, while the deal continues, you can pick it up at the all-time lowest price we have tracked, saving you $27 off the recent going rate and $200 off the MSRP. You’ll also find a large collection of extended EcoFlow Earth Day deals in our original coverage of the sale here, but there is no telling how much longer they’ll last.
